task_completion.description: Verify the flipchart is titled 'Sound Boxes'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Sound Boxes' added to the canvas or visible in the flipchart tab/title bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the Cat image is imported onto the canvas
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image of a cat visible on the ActivInspire page.

task_completion.description: Verify there are 3 square boxes below the Cat image
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for exactly 3 square or rectangular shapes positioned directly underneath the cat image.

task_completion.description: Verify the Frog image is imported onto the canvas
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image of a frog visible on the ActivInspire page.

task_completion.description: Verify there are 4 square boxes below the Frog image
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for exactly 4 square or rectangular shapes positioned directly underneath the frog image.

task_completion.description: Verify there are at least 5 red circular chips at the bottom
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 5 or more red circular shapes placed at the bottom area of the ActivInspire page.

task_completion.description: Verify the flipchart is saved to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or the main window title bar showing the file saved as 'phonemic_awareness.flipchart' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the activity
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with the ActivInspire application interface, including its toolbars, shape tools, and canvas.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI creation
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent is not using a terminal window to run a script that generates the .flipchart ZIP archive programmatically.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used shape tools rather than pasting a single pre-made image of the whole activity
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of individual shapes being drawn or manipulated (e.g., selection handles on individual boxes or circles) rather than a single static image containing all elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an Elkonin Boxes (Sound Boxes) activity in ActivInspire. There must be exactly 3 square boxes for the Cat (representing 3 phonemes: /k/ /æ/ /t/) and 4 square boxes for the Frog (representing 4 phonemes: /f/ /r/ /ɒ/ /g/). There must be at least 5 red circular chips at the bottom of the page. The final file must be saved as 'phonemic_awareness.flipchart' in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/.
